purpose: Durable repo-managed matrix that records the all-locale Apple HIG localized UI completion state per locale per scoped surface, plus the canonical finding taxonomy. As of the 2026-05-18 closure, it records a scoped simulator HIG UI claim for all supported locales and preserves explicit non-claims for physical-device, TestFlight, and automated AX settled proof.

scoped_surfaces.label: Build Info
scoped_surfaces.evidence_target: committed screenshot artifact under automation/proofs/<slice>/ with manifest.json (sha256 + bytes) and matching committed source

scoped_surfaces.label: Today launch
scoped_surfaces.evidence_target: settled Today shell screenshot with header greeting, focus three, readiness band, and visible nudge copy

scoped_surfaces.label: Root tabs
scoped_surfaces.evidence_target: all root tab labels visible without truncation; reachable; ordered per locale direction

scoped_surfaces.label: Primary empty states
scoped_surfaces.evidence_target: Today/Train/Write/Career/Home/Patterns/Settings empty-state copy reads cleanly in locale

scoped_surfaces.label: Primary actions
scoped_surfaces.evidence_target: primary CTA labels remain idiomatic and recognizable; no truncation; meaning preserved

scoped_surfaces.label: High-risk date/count/plural surfaces
scoped_surfaces.evidence_target: locale-aware Date.FormatStyle / stringsdict pluralization confirmed visually for ranges, counts, and relative dates

scoped_surfaces.label: Dynamic Type + accessibility pass
scoped_surfaces.evidence_target: standard text size + Larger Accessibility Text rendering; accessibility labels/values/hints localized; tab reachability and touch targets preserved

scoped_surfaces.label: RTL-only mirroring
scoped_surfaces.evidence_target: layout mirrored; alignment, navigation affordances, ordered controls, and directional symbols correct; digits inside numbers not reversed; non-direction-bearing artwork not flipped

severity_levels.definition: Visible localized UI fails an Apple HIG requirement in a way that prevents calling the surface UI-ready in that locale. Examples: untranslated visible label, truncated meaning-bearing label, broken RTL mirroring, inaccessible action.

Visible localized UI is degraded but the action remains discoverable. Examples: long compound truncation that loses qualifier, inconsistent terminology across one surface, missed locale-aware date format.
Cosmetic or stylistic issue that does not impair comprehension. Examples: slightly awkward phrasing accepted by reviewer, non-critical glyph fallback.
Observation that is not a defect but should be tracked. Examples: deliberately retained English product term, locale-specific phrasing choice.

closed_findings.summary: TodayView 'chevron.right' SF Symbol does not auto-mirror under RTL.
Arabic Career tab label 'المسيرة المهنية' (15 chars) is the longest Career label across all 19 locales; tab-bar truncation risk.
closed_findings.screenshot_inspection_2026_05_18: Captured Today screenshot for this locale. iOS auto-shrinks the longer tab label at iPhone 17 portrait default Dynamic Type; no literal truncation observed. Severity downgraded from major to minor.
closed_findings.closure_evidence: Maintained regression coverage added: owlory_xcode/OwloryUITests/OwloryUITests.swift LocalizationAccessibilityRegression (testFreshDayShellSettlesUnderLargerAccessibilityText<locale>): shell settles + 5 tabs hittable under UICTContentSizeCategoryAccessibilityXL. Test passed under iPhone 17 / iOS 26.5 simulator. Combined with the screenshot-verified evidence at automation/proofs/app-localization-hig-multisurface-screenshot-harness/20260518T103428Z-today-capture/ that iOS auto-shrinks the longer tab labels without literal truncation at default Dynamic Type, this closes the finding via maintained coverage. Underlying degradation (reduced text size for the longer-label tabs) is documented honestly and is not a HIG defect that can be 'fixed' without changing the labels themselves.

closed_findings.summary: German Today UI surfaced English evening reflection nudge copy.
observed_evidence: "Close the day with one quick reflection."
closed_findings.notes: Source fix shipped under app-localization-evening-reflection-nudge-routing. Finding stays open until a rerun screenshot for the German Today surface is captured under automation/proofs/ with manifest.json. (Re-gated 2026-05-18: source_fix_confirmed=true; awaiting post-fix screenshot capture under app-localization-hig-multisurface-screenshot-capture.)
closed_findings.closure_evidence: Source fix routes Today reflection nudge display through localized keys notification.prompt.eveningReflection.{title,body} in TodayView. German Localizable.strings contains Abendreflexion / Schließen Sie den Tag mit einer kurzen Reflexion. Clean-build German Today screenshot proof is preserved at automation/proofs/app-localization-hig-multisurface-screenshot-harness/20260518T170353Z-closure-capture/33-locale-de-surface-today.png with manifest automation/proofs/app-localization-hig-multisurface-screenshot-harness/20260518T170353Z-closure-capture/manifest.json. The capture ran at midday, so it does not force the evening trigger state; closure relies on deterministic source/key routing plus post-fix German Today screenshot evidence.

closed_findings.summary: WriteView 'arrow.right.circle' SF Symbol (2 call sites) does not auto-mirror under RTL.
closed_findings.closure_evidence: Source fix replaced WriteView directional arrow.right.circle call sites with arrow.forward.circle. Clean-build Arabic Write screenshot proof is preserved at automation/proofs/app-localization-hig-multisurface-screenshot-harness/20260518T170353Z-closure-capture/11-locale-ar-surface-root-tab-write.png with manifest automation/proofs/app-localization-hig-multisurface-screenshot-harness/20260518T170353Z-closure-capture/manifest.json; screenshot uses RTL tab order and records screenshot-only AX fallback. Swipe-action symbol visibility is source-verified rather than directly screenshot-captured.

automated accessibility-tree settled assertions for the 2026-05-18 closure screenshots (idb returned application-only AX tree; screenshots used recorded coordinate fallback)

notes.summary: On 2026-05-18 the project owner recorded internal-reviewer signoff (not native speaker) for the 17 non-German locales in localization/review/<locale>/<locale>-review-return.json (provenance.internal_reviewer_signoff). HIG bucket-gate slices no longer block on native-review intake; their depends_on lists were updated accordingly. per_locale_state below reflects the new gate eligibility: native_review_state still describes the language quality (LLM-drafted), and gate_state moves from blocked-on-native-review to unblocked-pending-screenshot-evidence.

All 4 bucket-gate slices + German re-gate now complete. 10 new open findings + HIG-DE-001 in-progress. 8 of 10 share tab-truncation fix shape. 2 (HIG-AR-001/002) are deterministic RTL SF Symbol defects. Triage queued 3 remediation slices: rtl-sf-symbol-fix, hig-multisurface-screenshot-capture, tab-bar-truncation-fix.

app-localization-rtl-sf-symbol-fix landed source fix for HIG-AR-001 (chevron.right -> chevron.forward in TodayView:566) and HIG-AR-002 (arrow.right.circle -> arrow.forward.circle in WriteView:88,181). Both findings moved from open_findings to in_progress_findings with source_fix_confirmed=true. Closure requires post-fix Arabic screenshot evidence under app-localization-hig-multisurface-screenshot-capture.

app-localization-hig-multisurface-screenshot-capture landed 18 today-surface screenshots (one per non-English locale) under automation/proofs/app-localization-hig-multisurface-screenshot-harness/20260518T103428Z-today-capture/. Inspection: HIG-AR-001 closed-fixed (chevron auto-mirrors under RTL). The 8 tab-truncation findings (HIG-AR-003 + HIG-DE-002 + HIG-FR-001 + HIG-JA-001 + HIG-NL-001 + HIG-RU-001 + HIG-TR-001 + HIG-UK-001) downgraded from major to minor: iOS auto-shrinks labels to fit at iPhone 17 portrait default; literal truncation does not occur. HIG-AR-002 stays in-progress (WriteView Arabic not captured). HIG-DE-001 stays in-progress (evening-reflection state not directly captured).

app-localization-tab-bar-truncation-fix reframed to maintained-coverage scope (entry condition was not met: literal truncation does not occur at iPhone 17 default Dynamic Type). Added 7 new tests to LocalizationAccessibilityRegression covering fr/ja/nl/ru/tr/uk/ar at UICTContentSizeCategoryAccessibilityXL (de + en already covered). All 11 accessibility tests passed; 15-test localization regression suite green in 91.8s. Closed 8 tab-truncation findings via maintained coverage. No UI tweak applied.

Project owner reported native/fluent review complete for all localization. The 17 remaining non-German review return files were promoted to provenance.native_reviewed=true with 419/419 native-reviewed entries each. Native review blockers are removed from per-locale HIG matrix state, but HIG UI readiness remains unclaimed pending scoped evidence and closure.

All-locale localized UI HIG closure proof captured under automation/proofs/app-localization-hig-multisurface-screenshot-harness/20260518T170353Z-closure-capture/: 19 locales x 8 scoped surfaces = 152 PNGs, 0 failures, clean build a7813a8. All per-locale gates moved to passed-scoped; HIG-DE-001 and HIG-AR-002 closed with explicit source-plus-screenshot evidence. Device/TestFlight proof remains unclaimed, and the closure screenshots used screenshot-only AX fallback because idb describe-all returned only the application node.
